flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Rivier University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (60.4% → 51.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Rivier University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rivier University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.5k → $39.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rivier University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.5k → $39.5k).
